_comment: SEED for Moonozy's per-user working state. .moonozy/state.json itself is gitignored (per-developer); on first run the orchestrator/SessionStart hook copies this file to .moonozy/state.json if it is missing. Shared, durable facts also live in committed CLAUDE.md and the glossary. Edit this seed (and CLAUDE.md) for changes the whole team should inherit on a fresh clone.

stack._comment: Filled by Moonozy on first run by detecting manifest/build files. Record languages, frameworks, the build/test/lint commands the project ALREADY uses, the architecture style, and module layout. Moonozy adapts to this — it never imposes a new toolchain.

tracker._comment: mode 'local' (default): track work items in the PRD checklist + openDebt, no external tracker. mode 'required': every change needs a ticket in the system below BEFORE implementation/commit. system: jira | linear | github | none. project: the project key/repo. Set this once you wire up a tracker MCP.

ubiquitousLanguageSource: The glossary path in `glossary` is the SINGLE canonical glossary. No second glossary; the domain-model skill writes terms into it. docs/architecture/domain/ holds only non-glossary structural docs (context-map.md, aggregates.md).

gates._comment: How quality is enforced in THIS repo. Moonozy ships Claude-side guardrail hooks (path protection, dangerous-git block, trunk-protection, PoC graduation gate, format-on-edit) that activate only once .moonozy/state.json exists. Record any project-side gate here too (e.g. a git pre-commit hook, lint-staged).
gates.claudeGuardrails: active (PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks from the moonozy plugin)
gates.projectPreCommit: describe the repo's own pre-commit/CI fast checks here, if any

ci._comment: The project's real pipeline — the Council scores the DORA axis against THIS, not the commit gate alone.

agentTeams.note: Tier 2 (collaborative). Default is Tier 0/1 (inline / delegated subagents).
